
Purpose of this folder

This folder contains reusable prompt fragments that can be included inside agents or tasks. Snippets are not slash commands and are not invoked directly.
File types
🧱 Snippets

Snippets provide reusable rules, standards, or guidelines.

    Naming pattern: snippet.<topic>.md

    Examples:

        snippet.coding-standards.md

        snippet.commit-message.md

        snippet.avalonia-ux.md

Use snippets to avoid duplication across multiple prompts.
File structure

Snippets should be:

    Short (20–120 words, max ~200)

    Focused on a single topic

    Written as standalone fragments

Folder expectations

    Only snippet files live here.

    No YAML front‑matter is required.

    Snippets should not define personas or tasks.
